titleStmt.title: SII 11.174: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 174. (B.K. No. 86 of 1927-28.) ĀLŪR, MUṆḌARGI PĒṬHĀ, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE WALL OF THE VĪRABHADRADĒVA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This damaged inscription in Kannada interspersed with a few Sanskrit verses belongs to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditva VI) and introduces his officer, Mahāmātya, Antaḥpurādhyaksha, Surigeya Permmāḍiyarasa, son of Surigeya Mādhava and Muddiyakka, as administering Māḷa[dālūru] by the favour of the king. It records the gift of land and money made by the latter officer to the Two-Hundred Mahājanas of the place for the worship of a goddess (name lost) and the maintenance of the Ṛigvēda khaṇḍika (school for teaching Ṛigvēda).

The record is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year [49], [Krōdhi], Śrāvaṇa, puṇṇami, [Sunday]. The puṇṇami quoted in the inscription commenced on Sunday, 27th July, A.D. 1124 at ·13 and ended the next day at ·20 of the day. There occurred, however, a lunar eclipse on the latter day, i.e. Monday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastasmai varāhāya līlayā caratē mahīṁ khurāntaragatō yasya mēruḥ khaṇa khaṇāyatē . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayam śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja para
mēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalla dēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ salutta
mire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . Ene negarddā tribhuvanamallanarēśvarano ḷpasāyitaṁ sakaḷa jagajjananuta dēceyabhaṭṭara taneyaṁ vāśiṣṭakuḷaviyattaḷacandra . kuntaḷa vikrama�ki .
ya santōśame gaṁḍagāḍiyāytenipaṁ niści(ṁ)ntamahāpasāyita nāntaribaḷavidaḷanaṁ mahādēvabudha . narapati cāḷukyakuḷāṁbaramaṇi permmāḍidēva nativīra nirantaradhyāni tannakaṭṭu
va surigeya nesaveseye piḍisuvaṁ jagavaṟiyalu . mādige budhajanahṛdayāhlādige karppūracaṁdanāgarukhuśriṇāmōdige nutasakaḷakaḷāvēdige sama noḷa
re sakaḷaviśvaṁbhareyoḷu . Ā daṇḍēśana sati munnādiyarundhuti dharitri jānaki sāvitṛdēvi satyabhāmā śrīdēviye muddiyakka neṁbudu lōka . vritta . giri
śaṁgaṁ gaurigaṁ śaṇmukha nasurakuḷadhvaṁśigaṁ rukmiṇīsundarigaṁ pradyumna niṁdraṁ gagaṇitaguṇe paulōmigaṁ śrījayantaṁ suravaryya rppuṭṭuva ntuttama nenise mahādēvadaṇḍā
dhipaṁgaṁ caritaśrīmuddiyakkaṁ gagaṇitavibhavaṁ puṭṭe permmāḍidēva . kanda . sādhitavibhavaṁ surigeya mādhava neṁbudayakudharadi ndudiyisidaṁ bādhitariputimiraṁ sū budhakaṁja
permma naṁbāditya . vritta . sthiranē mēru dharādharaṁ śuciye gaṁgāśaṁbhavaṁ dharmatatparanē pāṁḍusutāgrajaṁ kaliye kālēyārjjunaṁ satyanirbhbharanē karṇna nudāranē surakujaṁ
tāneṁba satkīrtti visterisalpermmege nermmevādanatuḷaṁ permmāḍi bhūpōttama . siriśiṣṭē ṣṭādigēhāmaragiricaritaṁ vēdaśāstrōktimāḷābharitaṁ rūpajaganmōhanamadana jaya
tsupratāpaṁ svaśauryyaṁ dhuradurddāntāryyavāryya(ṁ) ntanagesedire cāḷukyacakrēśa kāruṇnyarasa kkādhāranādaṁ kali surigeya permmāḍi kīrttiprasaṁgaṁ . Āryye .
śuklapratipadviḷasaccandravada ditōditādhikārassan patyuḥ prasādanityō jīvatu pe(ṁ)rmmā ḍiriha mudārkkēnduḥ . Antaṟpuradadhyakṣaṁ kuntaḷapati yitta surigeviḍi vadhikāraṁ santatada tantra
hāḷikeyintu mahāmārtyapadavigivu saṁcakara . Ā daṇḍēśvarana mahāsati yentappaḷeṁdeḍe . śrīvallabhaneni paccutadēvaṁ permmāḍirūpini ndavatarisalu bhāvaki tānuṁ la
kṣmīdēvi mahādēvi yāda ḷeṁbudu bhuvana . munnōnta mahātapavadu sannidavāytenipa rūpa saubhāgyaguṇaṁ tannoḷnile patihitasaṁpanne mahādēviyakkenena meccadarāru .
stutasarvvalakṣaṇānvite patibratācāracārusāvitri yarundhati permmāḍimanōhaṁsa taḥpayōdhāre parijanāmarabhūje . Intu sadāraṁ satataṁ santōśadō
ṟecakravarttiya kāruṇnyantanagesadire dha(r)mmākrāntamanaṁ bhāvisutta mi(r)®dondevase . Āryye . sa khamiha paratradharmmāditi viduśā tanmatissadā kāryyā karavāṇi janma
janmani tamēva cānyattadaviruddhaṁ . vṛtta . cirasetvōdrēkadiṁ vēdada viśeyavenalu khaṇḍikaṁ śāstrasaṁvyāharaṇaṁ paurāṇadharmmaśravaṇa vinitu vācandratāraṁbaraṁ susthiravāgalvērku
vendagriya renipa mahāvipravarggakke samkṣētrarayaṁ tadvṛtyupāyaṁ samabhimathamenalbhūmiyaṁ biṭṭanāgaḷu . © svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnā
nuṣṭānaparāyaṇajapasamādhiśīḷaguṇasaṁpanna rssamastaguṇagaṇāḷaṁkṛta rvviditavēdevēdārtthatatvara ranēkasmṛtipurāṇatarkkavyākaraṇaviśeyapariṇata rssandhyōpāsananityakarmma
japahōmāgnihōtṛga ḷgaṁgāsnānapavitṛkritaśarīra śāstrakuśalarmmaṟege vare kāva rddrōhakuḷāntaka rssaptasōmasaṁsthāvabhritha�vagāhanapavitṛkritaśarī
ra rnnāmādi samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīma grahāraṁ śrīmanmāḷadālūra Ūroḍeyapramukha mahājanavinnūrvvaru dharmmaṁgaḷaṁ1 svadharma
diṁ surakṣitamāge parirakṣi suttamirppuda kaṇḍu hāmārtya padavīvirājamāna mānōnnata prabhumantrōtsāhaśaktitrayasampannaṁ śrī
madantaḻpurādhyakṣaṁ tantrapāḷa radhiṣṭāyakaṁ permmā ḍiyaresaru cakravarttiya prasādōpalabdhiyiṁ māḷadālū
ra mēlāḷkeya sukhadindā ṭapamaṁ māḍisi dēvi yaṁgabhōganivēdyakke rugvēdada khaṇḍika yama
niyamasvādhyā ṇasaṁpannarappa śrīmadegrahāraṁ māḷadālūra Ūroḍeya pramukha
ru grāmakāryya ḍiyarasara kayyalu svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣada [49 ya krōdhi]
śrāvaṇada puṇnami Ā takadaccina poṁgadyāṇa vippattaydu Aṁkadoḷaṁ poṁgadyāṇa 25 koṭṭa
geyya tevaralu mattaru 50 mūḍaṇa mēre traipuruṣa mūḍa saṁkamayyana keyyiṁ teṁkaṇa mēre Ayva
lu gāumārara cauḍaṇana keyyi ntaṁkaṇa kaṁcavaḍḍada mēre maṇana keyi seṭṭigeyi Intinitu
ra kēsiyaṇana keyi Antu nālku meyya sīmeyi ndūḷage biṭṭa mattaru Ayvattu Antu mattaru 250 vaṁ sarvanamaśyamāgi sarvvabādhāparihāra
pratipāḷisuvaru Īdharmma kanukūlarāgi naḍeyisidavargge prayāge Argghyatīrttha vāraṇāsi kurukṣētra gaṁge kavileyaṁ paṁcaratna
Ī dharmmamaṁ pratikūlarāgi kiḍisidavarggā tīrtthadoḷā kavileyma ma nā brāhmaṇaruma
yāṁ jāyatē krimi [.] sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛ pāṇāṁ kālē kālē
caṁdraḥ ©
Digital edition of SII 11.174 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
